prompt: Create an ultra-realistic editorial fashion photograph of a beautiful young South Asian woman standing alone on the Hatirjheel lakeside promenade in Dhaka, Bangladesh during golden hour. She is the only person in the scene, shown from the waist up in a three-quarter back pose, turning her head over her shoulder to look directly at the camera with a soft confident smile. She has long loose dark brown hair gently blown by the breeze, natural glowing makeup, and elegant youthful features. She wears a fitted ribbed cream beige long-sleeve top, high-waisted black trousers, and a dark wristwatch. The background shows the calm lake on the left reflecting a low orange sun, the iconic arched Hatirjheel bridge in the distance, a clean paved walkway with a curved metal railing on the right, palm trees, landscaped greenery, and a black roadside sign reading হাতিরঝিল, ঢাকা. Use warm cinematic sunset light, soft rim lighting on her hair, shallow depth of field, realistic skin texture, editorial fashion composition, vertical 3:4 framing, 35mm lens perspective, high detail, natural colors, and no visible crowds, tourists, men, women, photographers, or foreground vehicles.
promptEn: Create an ultra-realistic editorial fashion photograph of a beautiful young South Asian woman standing alone on the Hatirjheel lakeside promenade in Dhaka, Bangladesh during golden hour. She is the only person in the scene, shown from the waist up in a three-quarter back pose, turning her head over her shoulder to look directly at the camera with a soft confident smile. She has long loose dark brown hair gently blown by the breeze, natural glowing makeup, and elegant youthful features. She wears a fitted ribbed cream beige long-sleeve top, high-waisted black trousers, and a dark wristwatch. The background shows the calm lake on the left reflecting a low orange sun, the iconic arched Hatirjheel bridge in the distance, a clean paved walkway with a curved metal railing on the right, palm trees, landscaped greenery, and a black roadside sign reading হাতিরঝিল, ঢাকা. Use warm cinematic sunset light, soft rim lighting on her hair, shallow depth of field, realistic skin texture, editorial fashion composition, vertical 3:4 framing, 35mm lens perspective, high detail, natural colors, and no visible crowds, tourists, men, women, photographers, or foreground vehicles.
promptZh: 创作一张超写实的编辑风格时尚摄影作品，拍摄一名美丽的年轻 南亚 女性，她独自站在孟加拉国达卡的 Hatirjheel 湖滨长廊上，时间处于黄金时刻。她是场景中唯一的人，画面呈现腰部以上的四分之三背影，她转头越过肩膀直视镜头，带着自信而柔和的微笑。她留着一头被微风轻轻吹拂的飘逸 深棕色 长发，妆容自然透亮，五官优雅年轻。她身穿一件修身的 米色 罗纹长袖上衣，搭配黑色高腰长裤，佩戴一块深色手表。背景左侧是平静的湖面，倒映着低垂的橙色夕阳；远处可见标志性的 Hatirjheel 拱桥；右侧是干净的铺砌步道，配有弯曲的金属栏杆、棕榈树和景观绿植；路边有一个黑色指示牌，上面写着 হাতিরঝিল, ঢাকা。采用温暖的电影感夕阳光线，发丝带有柔和的轮廓光，浅景深，真实的皮肤质感，编辑风格的时尚构图，3:4 竖构图，35mm 镜头视角，高细节，自然色彩，画面中不可出现人群、游客、男性、女性、摄影师或前景车辆。
